prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Harrop HTV 2650 TVS supercharger kit (engine code: AJ133S, 5.0L V8) with a custom pulley reduction to 2.65" (stock: 2.85"), paired with a Lingenfelter intercooler and heat exchanger for sustained 650+ WHP on 93 octane with a supporting fuel system (Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors and Walbro 450 LPH dual-pump setup).

Full exhaust system overhaul with a Milltek Sport non-resonated cat-back (3.5" titanium tips) and a custom X-pipe merge collector, paired with a set of GESI 200-cell high-flow catalytic converters to maintain emissions compliance while reducing backpressure by 40%.

Suspension and handling package featuring a KW Clubsport 3-way coilover kit (8-position rebound, 16-position compression, adjustable top mounts) with custom valving for the XFR-S chassis, paired with polyurethane subframe bushings from Vibratechnics and a Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) to eliminate body roll under hard cornering.
estetica: Full carbon fiber aero package from Prior Design (PD800R kit), including a front splitter with integrated canards, side skirts with air curtains, and a rear diffuser with a central fin, all finished in matte carbon weave with gloss clear coat.

Custom 20" BBS FI-R wheels (9.5J ET35 front, 11J ET40 rear) in a staggered fitment, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 front, 305/25 rear) for maximum grip, paired with AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 380mm and 355mm two-piece rotors, respectively.

Interior overhaul with a full Alcantara retrim (headliner, door cards, center console) from Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a custom MOMO Prototipo flat-bottom steering wheel (380mm) with integrated quick-release hub, and a set of Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses for track use.
